subcodes.first_line: Upon thee be the glory of God and His mention, and then the praise of all created things between earth and heaven throughout every age [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک بهاء الله و ذکره ثم ثناء کل الاشیا عما خلق بین الارض و السما فی کل زمان و
